title: PlatformProfile
description: 1:1 PII satellite of PlatformUser. Split from `platform_users` so encrypted-backup workflows can target PII independently. Carries first + last name (HR-controlled, not self-editable), display_name (self-editable), avatar_url, phone_e164 (required — on-call rotations dial this number), Slack + GitHub handles (nullable, internal comms + audit correlation), IANA timezone. Every column except display_name + avatar_url + slack_handle + github_handle is required.

display_name.description: Self-editable. When null, `full_name` computed accessor returns first_name + ' ' + last_name.

avatar_url.description: S3 URL of the current avatar. On update, PlatformProfileObserver schedules a delayed PruneOldAvatarJob (24h grace window).

phone_e164.description: E.164 format. Required because on-call rotations dial this number for escalation. Validated by `valid_e164_phone` rule.

slack_handle.description: Slack tenant handle (without leading @). Internal comms.

github_handle.description: GitHub username. Audit correlation for engineering staff (matches commit author to platform user).

timezone.description: IANA identifier (e.g. `America/New_York`, `Europe/London`). Validated by `valid_iana_timezone` rule. Drives the on-call rotation's local-time display.

indexes.name: platform_profiles_name_idx
indexes.description: Search acceleration for the platform-admin list surface.

indexes.name: platform_profiles_slack_idx
indexes.description: Reverse lookup: given a Slack handle from an inbound webhook, resolve the PlatformUser (e.g. for slash-command permission checks).

indexes.name: platform_profiles_github_idx
indexes.description: Reverse lookup: given a GitHub username from a commit-author webhook, resolve the PlatformUser.

phone_e164.description: E.164 format: leading +, country code, subscriber number, up to 15 digits total.

timezone.description: Validated at runtime against DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers() by the `valid_iana_timezone` rule.

full_name.description: Computed. display_name when set, else first_name + ' ' + last_name.

initials.description: Computed. First letter of first_name + first letter of last_name.

internal_handle.description: Computed. slack_handle when set, else github_handle when set, else first_name.

phone_e164_masked.description: Computed. phone_e164 with middle digits replaced by • unless caller has `platform.platform_profiles.view.pii`.

x-route-binding.note: Rarely used directly; the primary access path is /platform-profiles/me on the caller's own profile.
